\tzpentry{ID3390}{Quantum Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3390 introduces Quantum Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \mathcal{L}_{total} = \underbrace{\frac{1}{2}\omega \cdot (I \cdot \omega)}_{\text{Gyro KE}} + \underbrace{\frac{\epsilon_0}{2}\int (\partial_t A)^2 d^3x}_{\text{EM Field}} - \underbrace{\mu \cdot B_{ext}}_{\text{Zeeman}} + \underbrace{\frac{g\mu_B}{\hbar}L \cdot \mu}_{\text{Spin-Orbit}} + \mathcal{L}_{quantum} $$
